title: Lone Wolf and Cub: White Heaven in Hell
original_title: 子連れ狼 地獄へ行くぞ！大五郎
overview: With most of his family already dead at Ogami Itto's hands, Retsudo launches one final plot to destroy him, and when that fails, unleashes the fury of every remaining member of the Yagyu clan.
